faqs.a: Yes, we provide urgent structural assessments and repairs.

faqs.q: How long does a structural survey take?
faqs.a: Typically, surveys are completed within 2-3 days after the site visit.
We work closely with local authorities to ensure all necessary approvals are obtained.
Our services are available throughout the UK, primarily focusing on residential properties.
